creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173202
svn diff to update net/pjsip to version 2.5.5

portlint: OK
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p44, i386,  default options)
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p44, amd64, default options)
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.3-RELEASE-p5, i386,  default options)
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.3-RELEASE-p5, amd64, default options)

There is one problem I have yet to solve.  Running pjsua or trying to play a test sound with pjsystest gives

"Unable to find default audio device (PJMEDIA_EAUD_NODEFDEV)".

This is the same with both versions 2.5.1 and 2.5.5.
